summary: Backend API Testing Complete - All 18/18 tests PASSED. Verified all staff portal bug fixes: token extraction, Cases API, Shifts POST with user_id param, Counsellors status update, Safeguarding alerts, and Callbacks APIs.

minor.issue: Shift notification email fails due to unverified domain (radiocheck.me)
minor.details: Resend email notifications fail but shift creation succeeds - not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Login API correctly returns 'token' field (fix at line 230 of staff-portal/app.js confirmed)
Shifts POST endpoint works correctly with user_id query parameter (fix at lines 1751-1758 confirmed)
Cases API /api/cases works correctly with authentication
Counsellors status PATCH endpoint works for all statuses (available, limited, unavailable)
Safeguarding alerts and Callbacks APIs work correctly
Full authentication flow validated: login -> extract token -> access protected resources
seed_data_creation: Tests create test shifts and callbacks with TEST_ prefix. Cleanup performed for shifts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All staff portal bug fixes verified: (1) Token extraction fix - backend returns 'token' field and staff-portal now extracts it correctly at line 230; (2) Shifts POST - now includes user_id query param as required by backend; (3) Cases API added and working; (4) Counsellors status update working for all statuses.

POST /api/auth/login.details: Returns 'token' field in response - the key fix for staff portal authentication

GET /api/cases.details: Returns list of cases with authentication

GET /api/cases/morning-queue.details: Returns morning queue with high_priority and standard fields

POST /api/shifts/?user_id=....details: Creates shift with user_id query parameter - THE KEY FIX

GET /api/counsellors.details: Returns list of counsellors with authentication

GET /api/safeguarding-alerts.details: Returns safeguarding alerts with risk levels and status

full_auth_flow.details: Complete flow: login -> extract token -> access cases, callbacks, safeguarding alerts all working

staff_portal_app_js_line_230.issue: Token extraction used data.access_token but backend returns data.token

staff_portal_app_js_lines_1751_1758.issue: Shift creation didn't include user_id query parameter
staff_portal_app_js_lines_1751_1758.fix: saveShift now includes user_id, user_name, user_email as query params

staff_portal_cases_functionality.fix: Added case management functions (lines 1939-2398) and Cases tab in HTML
